Variables.Name: BiomesInfoObjectList
Variables.Description: List of BiomesInfoObject used by this Landscape Actor

Variables.Name: NoiseTexture
Variables.Description: Noise Texture applied when sample splatmap

Variables.Name: NoiseMultiplier
Variables.Description: Larger the value is, larger the UVOffset will applied when sample splatmap

Variables.Name: NoiseLerpPercentFromEdge
Variables.Description: Starting percentage of lerp from Edge to center of the component, to avoid shifted UV go over the component.

Variables.Name: DiffuseArrayInfo
Variables.Description: Diffuse texture array used as base color to render the landscape

Variables.Name: NormalArrayInfo
Variables.Description: Normalmap texture array used as base color to render the landscape

Variables.Name: MaterialIdLayerCount
Variables.Description: MaterialId Layer Count, fixed with 2, align SJZ
